description: Create an interactive GeoGebra worksheet that demonstrates the 'Least Squares' regression concept using points A=(1, 2), B=(2, 3), C=(3, 5), D=(4, 4), and E=(5, 7). The worksheet must feature a moveable 'guess' line, vertical residuals from each point to the line, and geometric squares on those residuals to visualize squared errors. Calculate and display the sum of the areas of these squares (the Sum of Squared Residuals) and include the actual regression line for comparison. Save the project as 'least_squares.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
